error_signature: identical responses causing pagination to stop
context_key: HTTP node with Rize.io GraphQL API
title: Pagination stops due to identical responses
symptom: The HTTP node fails to paginate correctly, returning identical responses multiple times and eventually stopping requests. This leads to server errors after several attempts.
not_this_if: Pagination works with fewer than 5 pages
Different API or node is used
root_cause: The 'after' value in the pagination request does not update correctly, causing the same page to be requested repeatedly. After several identical requests, the server responds with errors, such as 500 Internal Server Error.
fix_steps: Ensure the 'after' value is updated correctly in each iteration.
Add the 'first' parameter to limit the number of tasks returned per request.
Test the pagination to confirm it retrieves different pages.
agent_instruction: Update the pagination parameters to include a correctly updating 'after' value and add the 'first' parameter.
